documents.title: Nominee Form 278
documents.summary: Pre-confirmation disclosure for EPA Administrator nominee. Lists outside positions as CEO of Zeldin Strategies, Chairman of Zeldin Cares, President of LMZ Consulting, and director seats at Plymouth Union Public Research, Republican Jewish Coalition, America First Works, and Project Z. Discloses Zeldin Strategies salary of $775,000 plus $1M-$5M in dividends, $144,999 salary from America First Works, casino winnings from Golden Nugget, Venetian, and Atlantis, and numerous honoraria for op-eds placed via CGCN Group, DCI Group, and CRC Advisors.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Commits to resign from Zeldin Strategies upon confirmation and transfer his equity interest to his spouse within 90 days. Commits to place LMZ Consulting into inactive status and resign from America First Works, Zeldin Cares, Plymouth Union Public Research, Republican Jewish Coalition, and Project Z. Lists NeuroSense Therapeutics (NRNS) as a retained stock holding the agency determined did not require divestiture, with recusal commitments.

documents.title: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.summary: Self-certification filed roughly three weeks after confirmation, documenting completion of Ethics Agreement obligations including resignations and equity transfers.

documents.title: Form 278T Periodic Transaction Report
documents.summary: Discloses three transactions all dated within May 2025: a sale of NeuroSense Therapeutics (NRSN) on 05/13/2025, plus a paired Datavault (DVLT) purchase on 05/13/2025 and sale on 05/16/2025. Each in the $1,001-$15,000 range and marked No on the 30-day late notification flag.

documents.title: Form 278T Periodic Transaction Report
documents.summary: Discloses one transaction: a purchase of NeuroSense Therapeutics (NRSN) on 08/01/2025 in the $1,001-$15,000 range. Filer received a 30-day filing extension; the late notification flag is marked Yes.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: Not independently verified via ProPublica cross-check; Zeldin did not appear in the surfaced portion of the database during this review.
